visualizations.title: Mathematical Definition of a Multiple
visualizations.description: Multiples are formed by multiplying a base integer by any integer.

steps.explanation: Base Number: The original whole number you are finding multiples of.
Multiple: The resulting product, which grows larger with each step.

visualizations.title: Skip Counting by 3 on a Number Line
visualizations.description: Watch bouncing jumps of size 3, illustrating the first five multiples of 3: 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15.
